message:
📖 Add tracked repos and time frame note to leaderboard (#1279)

* 🐛 Fix single-page fetch in issue-only contributor discovery

The issue-only contributor discovery in generate-leaderboard.mjs only
fetched page 1 of the GitHub Search API results (max 100 items per page),
missing contributors whose issues appeared on later pages.

Added pagination matching the existing searchItems() pattern — loops up
to SEARCH_MAX_PAGES, respecting rate limits, and stops when all results
are fetched or a partial page is returned.

Fixes #1266

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 📖 Add tracked repos and time frame note to leaderboard

Show which repositories are tracked (console, console-marketplace,
console-kb) and that contributions are all-time, so visitors know
the scope of the leaderboard at a glance.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
